source: https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/earrival/ (current official web form), https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/ and https://ociservices.gov.in/onlineOCI/onlineOCI/faq (72-hour window and OCI applicability), plus https://www.cgisf.gov.in/section/public-advisories/digitization-of-disembarkation-card-for-foreign-nationals-visiting-india/ and https://www.eoisaotome.gov.in/page/e-arrival-card-information/ (official government mission guidance); re-checked 2026-07-14. The current crawlable form directly shows full name, nationality, passport number, purpose, arrival date, countries visited in the last 6 days, India address, state, district, email, phone, emergency phone, and a truth declaration. Government mission guidance also tells travellers to have flight and visa or OCI details ready, so those two travel-document fields are retained here because the form may prefill or reveal them by route or record. The official sources publish no general name, passport, visa or OCI number, address, email, or phone length limits. This local checker therefore uses broad conservative limits and YYYY-MM-DD dates; these are local checks, not quoted government restrictions.

full_name.label: Full name as in passport
full_name.help: Copy the full Latin-script name from the passport used to enter India. Do not shorten middle names.

errors.tooShort: Enter the name shown on the passport
errors.tooLong: Check the name; this local checker allows up to 100 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling shown on the passport

nationality.label: Nationality or region
nationality.help: Select the nationality or region of the passport you will present at Indian immigration.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the nationality or region shown on your passport

passport_number.label: Passport number
passport_number.help: Copy the passport number from the photo page. The official form publishes no universal length limit, so this checker uses a broad alphanumeric range.

errors.tooShort: Enter the passport number printed on the photo page
errors.tooLong: Check the passport number; this local checker allows up to 20 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use letters and numbers only, with no spaces or MRZ filler marks
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the passport number

visa_or_oci_number.label: Visa, e-Visa, or OCI number
visa_or_oci_number.help: Use the travel permission that applies to you: the visa or e-Visa reference for a visa holder, or the OCI number for an OCI cardholder. This card does not replace that permission.

errors.required: Enter the applicable visa, e-Visa, or OCI number

purpose.label: Purpose of visit
purpose.help: Choose the option that matches this trip, such as tourism, business, medical, conference, study, employment, official travel, or other.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the purpose that matches this trip

arrival_date.label: Date of arrival in India
arrival_date.help: Use the local date you reach India. The official form displays DD/MM/YYYY; this local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD. Submit within the 72 hours before arrival.

errors.invalidFormat: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker

flight_number.label: Flight number
flight_number.help: Enter the flight that lands in India, not a booking reference. Government mission guidance lists flight details among the information travellers should have ready.

errors.invalidFormat: Use the airline code and flight number, for example AI302 or SQ406

countries_visited_last_6_days.label: Countries visited in the last 6 days
countries_visited_last_6_days.help: Select every country the official form asks you to report for the previous 6 days. Use its No Country Visited option when that is true.

errors.required: List the countries or select No Country Visited

india_address.label: Address in India
india_address.help: Enter the full address of the first hotel, host, or residence in India, not only a city name.

errors.required: An address in India is required

state.label: State or union territory
state.help: Select the state or union territory for the India address. Confirm it with the hotel or host if unsure.

errors.required: State or union territory is required
errors.invalidOption: Choose the state or union territory for the address

district.label: District
district.help: Select the district that contains the India address. It is not always the same text as the city name.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the district for the address

email.label: Email
email.help: Use an inbox you control and can open while travelling. Check the domain before submitting.

errors.tooLong: Email is too long; this local checker allows up to 254 characters

contact_number.label: Contact number
contact_number.help: Enter the country or region code and a number where Indian immigration can reach you.

errors.invalidFormat: Include the country code and 7-15 digits

emergency_contact_number.label: Emergency contact number
emergency_contact_number.help: If provided, use a different reachable contact and include the country or region code.

errors.invalidFormat: Include the country code and 7-15 digits

declaration.label: Truth and accuracy declaration
declaration.help: Confirm only after checking that the information is true and accurate. The official warning says false information may lead to denial of entry or legal consequences.

errors.invalidOption: Confirm only after reviewing every answer
